headline: What's going on in today's session: S&P500 movers
summary: Join us in exploring the top gainers and losers within the S&P500 index one hour before the close of the markets on Friday as we examine the latest happenings in today's session.

headline: EQT Stock Is Near a Trough, Attracting Value Investors Ahead of Earnings
summary: Natural gas producer EQT Corp has had a rough 3 months, as analysts project significantly lower Q2 revenue. But EQT stock is at a 6-month low, attracting value investors, including those shorting 1-month puts.
